title: bridge-slack Slack signature verification uses correct constant-time comparison
description: verify_slack_signature uses a manual fold+XOR comparison (all byte pairs, no short-circuit) rather than a string equality that could short-circuit. The oracle test verifies the HMAC computation against a Python hmac module reference. The replay guard uses a ±5 minute window consistent with Slack docs. A contributor might replace the fold with a string compare or remove the oracle test; both should be rejected. The implementation is correct and well-justified.
